# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Unreleased work in progress**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 (next) is unreleased; work shown here has not yet shipped.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) fixed** — A native Skia image object was not being released when the crop rectangle overload of FromEncodedData returned a result, causing a memory leak on every call. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
